violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

"Puppy pads" are being used in the construction of shelf liners in the dairy cooler area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
Inspector observed wood debris, broken pallets, and trash around dumpster area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The door(receiving liftgate) to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the cooler vents have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, litter, debris clutter were observed in the outside trash compacter area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
